steps.title: Substitute x = 2 into the function
steps.content:
We need to find $f(2)$. The function is defined as $f(x) = x^3 + 15$. Substitute $x = 2$:

$$f(2) = (2)^3 + 15$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Calculate the power and add:

$$2^3 = 8$$

$$f(2) = 8 + 15 = 23$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
